title: Deputy Chief, Early Learning
notes: Dallas ISD has dedicated Early Learning Department under Teaching & Learning division. Derek Little leads Early Learning Department; oversees PreK 3 and PreK 4 (full-day per HB 3). Email format firstinitial+lastname@dallasisd.org confirmed across staff (dlittle@dallasisd.org). Department: Early Learning Dept; dedicated PreK 3 and PreK 4 expansion through Dual Language, Montessori, and PreK Partnership programs. Significant HB 1605 implementation work; adopted Bluebonnet Learning for K-5 reading 2024-25.

title: Chief, Equity & Excellence (oversees Early Learning)
notes: Fort Worth ISD Early Learning Department - exec director role has had turnover. Director of Early Learning historically Sherry Breed (now Chief Equity). Recent ED Early Learning is Dr. Karen Molinar (now interim Supt 2024-25). Email format firstname.lastname@fwisd.org confirmed. HB 1605-aligned PreK; full-day PreK at 60+ campuses. Significant Pre-K expansion via partnership with Camp Fire and YMCA.

title: Executive Director of Early Childhood
notes: Aldine ISD operates dedicated Early Childhood/Pre-K Academy schools (Hinojosa EC, Reed Academy, Stovall Academy, Vines EC). Tamiko Brown leads Early Childhood dept (also seen as Director of Early Childhood Education). Email format firstinitial+middleinitial+lastname@aldineisd.org or firstinitial+lastname@aldineisd.org (tlbrown@aldineisd.org pattern). HB 3 full-day PreK; high ED enrollment. Lupita Hinojosa is Supt.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Denton ISD has Early Childhood Department; PreK at multiple elementary campuses + Newton Rayzor EC. High-growth N. TX district. Susannah O'Bara is Asst Supt of Curriculum & Instruction. Email format firstinitial+lastname@dentonisd.org standard. HB 1605 Bluebonnet adoption discussions ongoing 2024-25.

title: Executive Director of Early Childhood
notes: Arlington ISD has dedicated Early Childhood department; full-day PreK at all elementary campuses (HB 3). Dr. Lori Beth Faulk leads Early Childhood. Email format firstinitial+lastname@aisd.net confirmed (lfaulk@aisd.net). Dr. Steven Wurtz is Chief Academic Officer. Reading Academies completed K-3. AISD piloted/adopted HB 1605 materials 2024-25.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small-rural McLennan County district (~2,000 students). No dedicated ECE director. Half-day Pre-K. Curriculum routed through campus principals + central admin. Cody Vanover serves as Asst Supt/C&I role. Email format firstname.lastname@chinaspringisd.net inferred from staff directory. PK at China Spring Primary.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Teaching & Learning
notes: Magnolia ISD (Montgomery County) - growing suburban district. No dedicated ECE director; PreK routed through T&L. Half-day Pre-K (qualifying). Email format firstinitial+lastname@magnoliaisd.org pattern. Dr. Todd Stephens is Supt. Mary Gallaway is Director of Curriculum (Elementary).

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: El Paso-area district. Canutillo Early Childhood Center is dedicated PreK campus (formerly Damian School). Full-day PreK for 4yo per HB 3. Email format firstinitial+lastname@canutillo-isd.org standard. Dr. Pedro Galaviz is Supt. Bilingual/dual-language PreK focus.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Corpus Christi-area district (~1,800 students). No dedicated ECE director. PreK at West Oso Primary. Curriculum led by Asst Supt/C&I (Dr. Lori Marshall or similar). Email format firstname.lastname@westosoisd.net inferred. Title I-funded PreK.

title: Director of Early Childhood/Pre-K
notes: RGV district; large enrollment (~32K). Dedicated Early Childhood Department; full-day PreK 3 and PreK 4; heavy bilingual/dual language. Dr. Mario Salinas is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@ecisd.us standard. HB 1605 adoption work underway. Title I PreK funding.

title: Director of Early Childhood/Bilingual
notes: RGV district; Mission CISD has Early Childhood / Bilingual / Migrant department. Full-day Pre-K. Carol G. Perez is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@mcisd.net standard. PreK at every elementary + dedicated PreK Academy (e.g., Pearson Elementary). Dual language.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Fast-growing Lubbock suburb (~7K+ enrollment). No dedicated ECE director; PreK routed through Asst Supt C&I. Half-day Pre-K at Lubbock-Cooper Central Elementary and East Elementary. Keith Bryant is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@lcisd.net standard. New elementary buildings opened 2024.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Amarillo-area district (~11K). No dedicated ECE director; PreK rolled into C&I. Darryl Flusche is Supt. Email format firstname.lastname@canyonisd.net standard. Half-day Pre-K at Sundown Lane and other elementaries. Reading Academies completed. Significant growth - new elementaries 2024-25.

title: Executive Director of Early Childhood
notes: Odessa ECISD - ~32K enrollment. Dedicated Early Childhood Dept; full-day PreK at multiple campuses including Carver Early Education Center. Dr. Scott Muri is Supt. Email format firstname.lastname@ectorcountyisd.org standard. ECISD has been part of Texas High-Quality Pre-K and significant ECE investment via local partnerships. HB 1605 adoption underway.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Longview ISD has dedicated Early Childhood Department; East Texas Montessori Prep Academy is district's PreK choice school. Full-day PreK. Dr. James Wilcox is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@lisd.org standard. Long-running ECE quality reputation; Montessori PreK.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Beaumont ISD ~17K enrollment. Has Early Childhood Dept; Pre-K at multiple elementaries + Head Start partnership. Dr. Shannon Allen is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@bmtisd.com standard. Title I PreK; Reading Academies completed. Post-Harvey rebuild ongoing.

title: Executive Director of Elementary Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Killeen ISD ~43K enrollment, Fort Cavazos military-connected. PreK at all elementaries (HB 3 full-day). Dr. Jo Ann Fey is Supt. Director of Early Childhood role housed under Elementary C&I. Email format firstname.lastname@killeenisd.org standard. Reading Academies K-3 completed. HB 1605 adoption process active.

title: Executive Director of Elementary Teaching & Learning
notes: Round Rock ISD ~47K enrollment, Austin suburb. PreK at multiple elementaries; full-day for eligible 4yo. Dr. Hafedh Azaiez is Supt. Email format firstname_lastname@roundrockisd.org (underscore, not dot). Director of Early Childhood role under Elementary T&L. HB 1605 adoption in progress. Pre-K growth via partnerships.

title: Executive Director of Learning & Innovation
notes: Small affluent Austin-area district (~7,800). No standalone PreK program - tuition-based Eanes Children's Center serves PreK. Jeff Arnett is Supt. Curriculum overseen by Exec Dir Learning & Innovation. Email format firstinitial+lastname@eanesisd.net standard (mmay@eanesisd.net). Limited public Pre-K footprint - non-traditional ECE target.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: San Marcos CISD ~7,800 students. Bonham Pre-K Academy is dedicated PreK center (full-day PreK). Dr. Tracy Sheriff (now Sandy Beach) is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@smcisd.net standard. HB 1605 adoption planned. Hill Country I-35 corridor growth.

title: Director of Early Childhood/Bilingual
notes: San Antonio-area East Central ISD ~10K. Has Pre-K Center (East Central Heritage). Full-day Pre-K. Dr. Roland Toscano is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@ecisd.net standard. PreK includes dual-language/bilingual programs. Note: same domain ecisd.net used; distinct from Edinburg CISD (ecisd.us).

title: Director of Bilingual/ESL and Early Childhood
notes: San Antonio Southwest ISD ~13K. PreK routed through Bilingual/ESL/Early Childhood combined dept. Lloyd Verstuyft is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@swisd.net standard. Full-day Pre-K. Bilingual/dual language. HB 1605 work pending.

title: Deputy Superintendent of Teaching & Learning
notes: Bryan ISD ~16K. James McIntyre Educational Complex serves PreK + has dedicated PreK programs. Dr. Christie Whitbeck oversees T&L (Deputy Supt). Director of Early Childhood is Brandi Stafford or similar Elementary Curriculum role. Email format firstname.lastname@bryanisd.org standard. HB 1605 active. Reading Academies complete.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Galveston ISD ~6,800. Magnolia Education Center is dedicated PreK/EC site. Dr. Mark Ross is Supt (or successor 2024). No standalone ECE director title published; PreK under C&I. Email format firstinitial+lastname@gisd.org standard. Post-Ike rebuild relevant; Title I PreK.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Alvin ISD ~30K (high growth Houston-area). Has Early Childhood Department; full-day PreK at multiple elementaries. Dr. Carol Nelson is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@alvinisd.net standard. HB 1605 active. New elementaries opening 2024-25 due to growth. Reading Academies completed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Brazoria County district ~2,200. No dedicated ECE director. PreK at West Brazos Junior High primary level. Asst Supt C&I (Trey Pittman or similar) oversees curriculum. Email format firstinitial+lastname@cbisd.com inferred. Half-day Pre-K (qualifying).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small coastal Matagorda County district (~1,300). No dedicated ECE director. PreK at Central Elementary. Curriculum led by elementary principal + supt directly. Email format firstinitial+lastname@palaciosisd.org inferred. Title I/migrant PreK funding.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small Lavaca County district (~500 students). No ECE director; supt direct contact. Pre-K limited/half-day. Email format firstinitial+lastname@shinerisd.net inferred. Rural - curriculum decisions made by elementary principal + supt.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small coastal San Patricio County district (~1,900). No dedicated ECE director. Olsen Elementary serves PreK. Curriculum routed through Asst Supt or Elementary principal. Email format firstinitial+lastname@apisd.org inferred. Half-day Pre-K. Post-Harvey rebuild relevant.

title: Director of Early Childhood/Bilingual
notes: Border district ~13K. Has Early Childhood / Bilingual / Migrant combined dept. Full-day PreK. Dr. Samuel Mijares is Supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@eaglepassisd.net standard. Heavy bilingual/dual language PreK. Title I.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Kerrville ISD ~4,800 (Hill Country). PreK at Tally Elementary or Tom Daniels EC. Dr. Mark Foust is Supt. No dedicated ECE director; rolls up to C&I. Email format firstname.lastname@kerrvilleisd.net standard. Half-day Pre-K (qualifying). Reading Academies completed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small East TX Gregg County district (~3,800). No dedicated ECE director; supt or elementary curriculum coordinator handles PreK. Kilgore Heights Elementary serves PreK. Email format firstname.lastname@kisd.org inferred. Half-day Pre-K.

title: Superintendent
notes: Lamar County district (~3,600). Aikin Elementary (early childhood/PK) - dedicated PreK center. No standalone ECE director; routed through Asst Supt of Curriculum. Email format firstinitial+lastname@parisisd.net standard. Half-day Pre-K (qualifying). Title I PreK funding.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small Upshur County district (~500 students). No ECE director - supt direct contact. PreK at Big Sandy Elementary. Email format firstinitial+lastname@bigsandyisd.net inferred. Rural; half-day Pre-K. Curriculum decisions by elementary principal + supt.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Angelina County district (~1,900). Diboll Pre-K Center serves PreK. No dedicated ECE director - routed through supt + elementary curriculum coordinator. Email format firstinitial+lastname@dibollisd.com inferred. Title I PreK; Pre-K full-day for qualifying 4yo.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Limestone County district (~1,700). McBay Early Childhood Center serves PreK + K. No dedicated ECE director. Curriculum routed through Asst Supt C&I + supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@mexiaisd.net inferred. Half-day Pre-K.

title: Superintendent
notes: Ellis County district south of Dallas (~2,800). Ferris Intermediate / Lucy Mae Elementary - PreK location. No dedicated ECE director; routed through C&I or supt. Email format firstinitial+lastname@ferrisisd.org inferred. Growing district due to S. Dallas suburb expansion.

title: Superintendent
notes: Tiny Ellis County rural district (~250 students). No ECE director - supt direct contact. PreK at Milford Elementary (very small program). Email format firstinitial+lastname@milfordisd.org inferred. All curriculum decisions made by supt + elementary principal.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Burleson ISD (Tarrant/Johnson County) ~12K. Fast-growing Fort Worth-area suburb. PreK at multiple elementaries. Dr. Bret Jimerson is Supt. No standalone ECE director; rolls under C&I/Elementary. Email format firstinitial+lastname@burlesonisd.net standard. New elementaries built 2023-24. Reading Academies completed.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Abilene ISD ~16K. Has dedicated Early Childhood Department; Woodson Center for Excellence is dedicated PreK center. Dr. John Kuhn is Supt. Email format firstname.lastname@abileneisd.org standard. Full-day PreK per HB 3. HB 1605 active. Reading Academies completed K-3.
